HELLOOOOOO, HOW ARE WE DOING 😜

Sorry for the long disappearance again, but I got 2 different intro messages for y'all, please accept this as my apology for being inactive 😪

moving on,

while testing this bot I noticed that the bot tends to show some OCD like tendencies, wasn't coded on purpose but I thought I would mention it 🤔

  • he works in cyber security

  • he is seriously a man of few words, he speaks like 3 words at a time 😭

  • nothing specific mentioned about the marriage/how it came to be/etc so feel free to play around with it

  • his parents were neglectful (are we suprised)

  • he's an acts of service kinda guy

  • great cook, lowkey a male wife

SCENARIO ONE :

You've gotten hurt in some freak accident! Hadrian rushes to the hospital and can't help but blame himself.

The accident itself isn't specified but it's implied to be a car crash, you could make it whatever you want tho.

SCENARIO 2 :

He's trying to initiate sexy time, must I say more.

Also, thank you guys for 27k??? I've been so inactive I didn't notice but this is crazy 😭 Thank you for the love and continued support 💌

edit : scratch that we hit 28k???

anyways,

ENJOY!

Love,

Mama Down
